title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: leapp bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for leapp is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Leapp utility provides the possibility to use the Leapp framework via CLI. The utility itself does not define any subcommands but "help". All leapp subcommands are expected to be provided by other packages under a specific directory. See the man page for more details.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL8.10/Leapp/RFE] Improve error when /var/lib/leapp is absent (JIRA:RHEL-54382)  Accept a falsy value for leapp command options defaults (JIRA:RHEL-86206)  Rebase leapp to v0.20.0 (rhel-8.10) (JIRA:RHEL-67625)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian

fixes.description: Accept a falsy value for leapp command options defaults

full_text:
An update for leapp is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Leapp utility provides the possibility to use the Leapp framework via CLI. The utility itself does not define any subcommands but "help". All leapp subcommands are expected to be provided by other packages under a specific directory. See the man page for more details.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL8.10/Leapp/RFE] Improve error when /var/lib/leapp is absent (JIRA:RHEL-54382)  Accept a falsy value for leapp command options defaults (JIRA:RHEL-86206)  Rebase leapp to v0.20.0 (rhel-8.10) (JIRA:RHEL-67625)
